In [48]:
from sklearn.preprocessing import OneHotEncoder

encoder = OneHotEncoder(sparse_output=False)

encoded_array = encoder.fit_transform(df[["hlpi_name", "nzhec_name", "level"]])
encoded_cols = encoder.get_feature_names_out()
In [49]:
encoded_df = pd.DataFrame(encoded_array,columns=encoded_cols,index=df.index)
df = df.drop(columns=["hlpi_name", "nzhec_name", "level"])
df = pd.concat([df,encoded_df],axis=1)

In [58]:
x=df[features]
y=df["exp_pw"]

from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split

x_train,x_test,y_train,y_test=train_test_split(x,y, test_size=0.2,random_state=40)
In [59]:
rf= RandomForestRegressor()
In [60]:
lr = LinearRegression()
In [61]:
rf.fit(x_train,y_train)

In [63]:
y_pred = rf.predict(x_test)
In [64]:
y_pred = lr.predict(x_test)
In [65]:
from sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error,r2_score
import numpy as np


mae = mean_absolute_error(y_test,y_pred)
mse = mean_squared_error(y_test,y_pred)
rmse = np.sqrt(mse)
r2 = r2_score(y_test,y_pred)

print(f"MAE: {mae:.2f}")
print(f"RMSE:{rmse:.2f}")
print(f"R2 Score: {r2:.2f}")

MAE: 12.17
RMSE:19.96

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))
residuals = y_test - y_pred
plt.scatter(y_pred,residuals,alpha=0.5)
plt.axhline(y=0, color="r",linestyle="--")
plt.xlabel("Predicted Values")
plt.ylabel("Residuals(Errors)")
plt.title("Residual Plot: Are Errors random?")
plt.show()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.figure(figsize=(8,8))
plt.scatter(y_test,y_pred,alpha=0.5,color="purple")
plt.plot([y_test.min(),y_test.max()],[y_test.min(),y_test.max()],"k--",lw=2)
plt.xlabel("exp_pw")
plt.ylabel("predicted expenses")
plt.title("Weekly expenses vs predicted expense")
plt.show()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt


plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))


importance = abs(lr.coef_) 
feature_importance = pd.Series(importance, index=x_train.columns).sort_values(ascending=False)

feature_importance.head(10).plot(kind="barh", color="steelblue")

plt.title("Top 10 Most Important Features (Linear Regression)")
plt.xlabel("Absolute Coefficient Value")
plt.gca().invert_yaxis() 
plt.show()
